description.content: Scrape any URL with anti-bot bypass and optional rendering.

Fetch and scrape any URL, optionally rendering JavaScript and routing through ZenRows' anti-bot, premium proxy, or geo-targeted proxy pool. Returns the rendered HTML by default, or a markdown/plaintext/PDF/JSON payload or a screenshot when the corresponding flags are set.

query.description: (Required) ZenRows API key for authentication.
(Required) Target URL to scrape (URL-encoded).
Set to `auto` to enable Adaptive Stealth Mode anti-bot bypass.
Render the page in a real browser before returning content.
Route the request through the residential proxy pool.
ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for proxy geolocation.
Forward custom HTTP headers from the request to the target site.
Numeric session identifier that pins the same proxy IP across requests for up to 10 minutes.
Base64-encoded list of browser instructions (click, scroll, wait, fill, evaluate) to execute after page load.
Fixed delay in milliseconds after page load before returning the response.
CSS selector to wait for before returning the response.
Comma-separated list of resource types to block during rendering (e.g. `image,stylesheet,font`).
URL-encoded JSON object mapping field names to CSS selectors for structured extraction.
Automatically parse the page into a structured JSON object using ZenRows' built-in extractors.
Return the response wrapped in JSON, capturing network requests, XHRs, and metadata.
Convert the rendered response into another format.
Capture an above-the-fold screenshot of the page.
Capture a full-page screenshot of the page.
CSS selector to scope the screenshot to a single element.
Output format for screenshot bytes.
JPEG quality from 1 to 100 (only with `screenshot_format=jpeg`).
Comma-separated list of structured outputs to extract (e.g. `emails,phone_numbers,links,images`).
Return the target site's original HTTP status code instead of ZenRows' normalized 200/4xx/5xx.
Comma-separated list of HTTP status codes for which content should still be returned.

response.name: Scrape result. The payload is HTML by default, JSON when `json_response`, `autoparse`, `css_extractor`, or `outputs` is set, markdown/plaintext/PDF when `response_type` is set, or image bytes when a screenshot flag is set.

header.description: Maximum number of concurrent ZenRows requests permitted by the plan.
Credit cost of the request (varies with js_render, premium_proxy, mode, response_type).
Unique identifier for the request, for support and log correlation.
Final URL of the page after redirects.

response.name: Bad Request. Codes include REQS001 (forbidden domain), REQS002 (needs js_render or premium_proxy), REQS004 (invalid parameters), REQS006 (invalid CAPTCHA solver key), RESP004 (invalid css_extractor), RESP008 (non-retryable target error).
Unauthorized. Codes AUTH001 (API key missing), AUTH002 (invalid format), AUTH003 (key not found).
Payment Required. Codes AUTH004 (usage exceeded), AUTH005 (key expired), AUTH010 (feature not in plan), AUTH011 (no active subscription), AUTH012 (subscription does not allow product).
Forbidden. Codes AUTH009 (email unverified), BLK0001 (IP blocked for excessive error rate).
Not Found. Codes RESP002 (target page 404), RESP007 (DNS unresolvable).
Content Too Large. Code RESP005 (response exceeds plan max download size).
Unprocessable Entity. Code RESP001 (could not retrieve content).
Failed Dependency. Code RESP006 (CAPTCHA solving failed).
Too Many Requests. Codes AUTH006 (concurrency limit exceeded), AUTH008 (rate limit exceeded).
Bad Gateway. Code RESP003 (could not parse content automatically).
Gateway Timeout. Code CTX0002 (request exceeded maximum time limit).

item.name: Scrape a URL With a POST Body

request.name: Scrape a URL With a POST Body

description.content: Variant of the scrape endpoint that forwards a request body to the target URL, used to scrape pages that only respond to POST.

query.description: (Required) ZenRows API key for authentication.
(Required) Target URL to scrape.

response.name: Response from the target site, mirroring the GET variant.

description.content:
The ZenRows Universal Scraper API fetches any public URL with optional JavaScript rendering, anti-bot bypass (Adaptive Stealth Mode), premium residential proxies, geographic targeting, CSS or AI-driven data extraction, custom JavaScript instructions, page screenshots, and output conversion to markdown, plaintext, or PDF. A single ZenRows API key authenticates this endpoint and shares a credit pool with the Scraping Browser, Residential Proxies, and Scraper APIs products. Source: https://docs.zenrows.com/universal-scraper-api/api-reference

Contact Support:
 Name: ZenRows
